title: KZ-4B record KZ-4
objective:
Run script:
"""
state_in = Path('governance/state/KZ4_SSOT_POST_CLEANUP_VALIDATION.json')
validation = json.loads(state_in.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if state_in.exists() else {'status':'blocked'}
valid = validation.get('status') == 'completed'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-4':
        task['status'] = 'DONE' if valid else 'BLOCKED'
        task['sha'] = '57b663d98632b36a782f74f4c542247914fba3db'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:06:21Z'
        task['active_duplicate_group_count'] = validation.get('active_duplicate_group_count')
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:08:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS' if valid else 'BLOCKED_ON_KZ4'
queue['next_action'] = 'await operator or Claude to add next tasks; do not invent tasks' if valid else 'repair active SSOT duplicate groups'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T15:06:21Z','id':'KZ-4','trace_id':'kz4_ssot_post_cleanup_validation','sha':'57b663d98632b36a782f74f4c542247914fba3db','status':'done' if valid else 'blocked','active_duplicate_group_count':validation.get('active_duplicate_group_count'),'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/KZ4B_RECORD_KZ4_CLOSE_QUEUE.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-4B','trace_id':'kz4b_record_kz4_close_queue','status':'completed' if valid else 'blocked','release_pass':valid,'recorded_step':'KZ-4','recorded_sha':'57b663d98632b36a782f74f4c542247914fba3db','queue_state':'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS' if valid else 'BLOCKED_ON_KZ4','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'ACTIVE_QUEUE empty; do not invent tasks' if valid else 'repair active SSOT duplicates'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ4B_RECORD_KZ4_CLOSE_QUEUE.md')
report.write_text('# KZ-4B | Record KZ-4 and close queue\nStatus: ' + ('completed' if valid else 'blocked') + '\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nKZ-4 validation SHA: 57b663d98632b36a782f74f4c542247914fba3db. Queue state: ' + ('EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS' if valid else 'BLOCKED_ON_KZ4') + '. Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.\n\nNext: ' + ('queue empty; do not invent tasks.' if valid else 'repair active SSOT duplicates.') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
